facts: IIT Bhubaneswar (Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar) is located at Jatani, Khordha, Odisha 752050.
Languages: Outside campus Odia and Hindi are spoken. Inside campus Hindi and English are used.
Autos are available 24/7 near IIT Bhubaneswar.
Ola, Uber, and Rapido are not available near IIT Bhubaneswar.
Khurda Road Junction railway station is 6.5 km from IIT Bhubaneswar.
Biju Patnaik International Airport is 29 km from IIT Bhubaneswar.
College buses run to Bhubaneswar city on weekends.
IIT Bhubaneswar has 3 boys hostels.
RHR hostel is for 1st year boys with separate (single) rooms.
MHR hostel is for 2nd year boys with separate (single) rooms.
BHR hostel is for 3rd and 4th year boys with separate (single) rooms.
All boys at IIT Bhubaneswar get single rooms.
IIT Bhubaneswar has 3 girls hostels.
Sangam hostel is for 1st year girls with 3-sharing rooms.
SHR hostel is for MTech/PhD girls with separate rooms.
GHR hostel is for 2nd to 4th year girls with separate rooms.

mess.timings: Breakfast 7:30-10:00 AM, Lunch 12:00-2:00 PM, Dinner 8:00-10:00 PM
mess.daily_compulsory: Bread (unlimited), Butter (2 chiplets), Jam (20g), Cornflakes/Oats, Sprouted grains, Milk (250ml), Tea, Salad
mess.cuisine: Mix of North Indian, South Indian (Masala Dosa, Punugulu, Pongal), and Odia specialties (Dalma). Non-veg options (Chicken Biryani, Fish Curry, Egg dishes) on select days. Desserts served with dinner.

facts: WiFi and LAN connectivity available in every hostel room at IIT Bhubaneswar.
Attendance policy at IIT Bhubaneswar is at the professor's choice. There is no fixed mandatory percentage.

clubs.sports: Sports clubs available for every sport

facts: Pravaah is the annual cultural and tech fest of IIT Bhubaneswar, held in February.
Washing machines available on every floor in all hostels at IIT Bhubaneswar.
Paid laundry service is also available.
Basketball, Volleyball, Tennis, Badminton, Football, and Squash courts available at IIT Bhubaneswar.
Sports clubs exist for every sport.
Every hostel at IIT Bhubaneswar has a canteen open till 1:15 AM (except Sangam hostel).
Late registration fine and malpractice fine are applicable at IIT Bhubaneswar.
Students can go out of campus 24/7 (except 1st year girls).
Shops inside IIT Bhubaneswar campus: Fruit shop, Bakery, Ice cream shop, Juice shop, Supermarket, Stationery shop, and General store.
Gym is available in the Student Activity Center at IIT Bhubaneswar.
24/7 free medical center at IIT Bhubaneswar.
Ambulance service available.
Apollo Pharmacy on campus.
Rs 5000 medical insurance provided to students.
Outside campus: Odia and Hindi. Inside campus: Hindi and English.
IIT Bhubaneswar offers B.Tech in CE (Civil), CSE (Computer Science), EE (Electrical), ECE (Electronics and Communication), EP (Engineering Physics), and ME (Mechanical).
Spring 2026 (2nd Semester) timetable is available for all branches.
